title: BLLQ Ear Hooks Compatible with Air Pods [Anti-Drop][Comfortable] [Fit] [Durable], Compatible with AirPod1 & 2 Earbud Ear Hook ，White
description:
Features
These BLLQ Anti-Slip Ear Hooks hold your Air Pods securely and prevents it from falling out. Great for running, jogging, cycling, gym and other fitness activities!
Fit &Comfortable
Ear Hooks are made from High Quality Hybrid Thermoplastic polyurethane(TPU) to ensure that they keep their shape perfectly fit for your ear and Air Pods, they are very useful to prevent earbuds falling out and very comfortable for use.
Easy Installation
Easy installation & hassle-free removal. Put the Air Pods on the Earhooks and it loops over the ear.
Durable
These Ear Hooks don’t fit in charge case, Please take if off before put into the charge case. But Don’t Worry: These High Quality Ear Hooks is very durable that they can be frequently put on and removed and would not be break or out of shape.
Package includes:
BLLQ Anti-Slip Ear Hooks 1 Pair (Left & Right 2 PCS), Blue cleaning cloth with BLLQ LOGO 1PCS,(Hooks Only ,Earphones not included).

⭕Warm Tips: ▲NOTE1: for Mac series, pls Go to Settings--Sound--Input(Output)--Select a Device for Sound Input(Output), then choose USB, to make the earbuds work;▲NOTE2: If the earbuds has No Sound when listening to audio on mobile, go to Setting-Developer Options, find “Disable USB audio routing”, Close this option;▲NOTE3: If others can NOT hear you while a call, please go to the setting, check whether you have turn on option “Microphone” or not, if not, please turn on the “Microphone” setting

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.text: If you're looking for an inexpensive wired set of ear buds, these are good. Not great on the bass, but they do sound decent. They plug directly into the USB C port of the phone, so no adapter is needed. The fit is good for my ears too. I mainly use this as a backup to my headphones in case they need to be charged.

reviews.title: These saved my ears! Literally.
reviews.text: My new Bose 700 headphones kept causing an allergic reaction to my ears and the skin all the way around my ears.  Like blisters, redness, swelling and SEVERE itching.  The first time, I wore them for an afternoon and it took 3 weeks for the allergy to be cleared up.  I then washed the cups of the headphones with a soapy wash rag and rinsed well.  The second time I wore them for just under 2 hours and again had a reaction that took 2 weeks to clear up.  I use another brand of headphones daily to watch TV (that I also purchased from amazon) and have never had a reaction before.  I found these covers and they have completely fixed the reaction issue.  I also ordered another brand of ear cup covers off amazon to try but prefer these.  I'll be ordering another so I'll have extras just in case 😉.

reviews.title: Does what i expect it to do
reviews.text:
I expect it to keep the sweat off the ear pads, and it does this.

But since it wraps over the ear cups, it does not allow the ear cups to rest nicely around your ears.
This means that it affects the headset's noise cancellation a bit.

Also, if you wear it for a prolonged amount of time, it hurts the ears and is less comfortable. I wear glasses and this exacerbates the tension behind my ears.
This is particularly for me with my glasses.

reviews.title: Reasonably comfy, but poor fabric quality and small sound hole.
reviews.text:
06/22/22. Revised rating down to 1-star. The fabric is awful, pills badly and attracts every bit of dust and hair. I stopped using these on Zoom calls because they look disgusting. See photo. This is what yours will look like after a few months.

----------------------

Fits my Yamaha MT5 headphones fine. It may make zero difference in sound, but I feel like the center hole is about half the size it should be. Not sure what they were thinking. I'd like to see to somebody make something similar, with thicker, more breathable fabric, and 1-inch hole.

reviews.title: Very big, but useful.
reviews.text: Very large, I was hoping for a snug fit. These extended further than the actual cushion.  So if you want to charge you will need to take off or just pull off a little. Still useful as I was tired of white peel off all over my skin and clothes. But definitely recommend for a bigger headphone.

reviews.title: Nice on the ears
reviews.text: Works great on my beats headphones

reviews.title: Handy
reviews.text: Good for gym or anywhere.

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: Poor quality silicone that easily tears
reviews.text: I didn't know that silicone could actually tear like this stuff has when I removed them from my AirPods. I'm past the return window and these literally ripped after about a month and a half of use when I was trying to slide them off the AirPods. Look elsewhere!

reviews.title: Air pod holder
reviews.text: Since they are plastic we will see hold long they last. They are a little difficult to get on and off.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

reviews.title: Tis Loud! Has great bass & long lasting battery!
reviews.text:
Alot of headphones lack good bass and sometimes cuts out, but not this set, these earbuds have great bass without over doing it.

Not a bad price to boot, and they're Skullcandy, nough said

reviews.title: Was expecting more from these
reviews.text: I love Skull Candy. But honestly I was expecting more and a better sound. They actually hurt my ears so they were a no go for me. Gave them to a niece.

reviews.title: I love Skullcandy Products!
reviews.text: Must BUY NOW!!💪👍

reviews.title: Good sound
reviews.text: They sound great. But they don't stay in the ear very well. I would buy this brand again. Maybe not this  Style

reviews.title: Amazing for the price... Great range, sound good.
reviews.text:
Battery latest me my whole work day.

Sound is good enough, bluetooth range is impressive, better then my Samsung buds.

Easy setup.

So far, very happy. Some people say I sound like im in an empy room, but some times it doesnt happen?

I dont know if its true noise canceling, but the buds are tight enough you dont get outside noise.

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

title: Bose SIE2i Sport Headphones - Purple
description:
Product Description
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized - a combination of benefits conventional sport ear buds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
From the Manufacturer
Bose® SIE2i sport headphones
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
StayHear ear tips remain in place even during strenuous workouts

Sweat- and weather-resistance, using hydrophobic acoustic cloth
Sweat- and weather-resistance, using hydrophobic acoustic cloth
Inline remote/mic controls music and takes calls with the press of a button
Inline remote/mic controls music and takes calls with the press of a button
Reebok fitness armband holds your audio device during exercise
Reebok fitness armband holds your audio device during exercise
Engineered for exercise™
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized—a combination of benefits conventional sport earbuds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
Water-resistant cloth keeps rain and sweat away from the headphones' speakers
Energizing sound. Bold style.
Exclusive TriPort headphone technology delivers wide-range sound, including the deep, convincing lows that give your music—and your workout—its pulse. And because it comes from an in-ear headphone, you'll feel driven without feeling closed off from your environment—a must when you're running outdoors. These headphones can add extra punch to your exercise routine.
Stability and durability
Our StayHear tips conform securely and comfortably to your ears' shape, even during vigorous workouts. The speaker elements are covered with hydrophobic cloth that keeps moisture out but lets sound pass through. Cables and connections are made extra sturdy. SIE2i sport headphones are made for motion. Even their bold colors (Green, Orange, Blue, Purple) have an energy all their own.
One-touch ease for music and calls
SIE2i sport headphones have an inline remote that offers convenient control over the music on your iPod or iPhone. Skip a tune with the press of a button. No need to touch your device—a great feature for running. There's also an inline microphone for taking calls and switching seamlessly between calls and music.
StayHear tips come in 3 sizes (S, M, L)
Reebok fitness armband
There's another great workout feature—the exclusive Reebok armband. It holds your music device in place when you're exercising, and stores the headphones when you're not. It even has a separate pocket for your keys. It's made of stretchy, breathable fabric that adjusts to fit most smartphones and MP3 players, and has a touch-sensitive window for easy usability. Available in colors to match your SIE2i sport headphones.

Exclusive Reebok fitness armband

reviews.title: Best headphones I have ever had
reviews.text: With Bose, you never have to worry about the sound quality.  It is excellent as usual.  The 3 different sized of ear pieces provided allow for a personalized fit.  They stay in place during all sorts of activities (running, yard work, etc..) and the soft earpieces are very comfortable.  The cord is split into 2 pieces which can be very convenient at times.  Without the extension, it works perfectly for an arm/exercise band.  With the extension, you can stick the phone in your pocket, backpack, etc..  and have some cord to spare.  The connection between the extension and the main cord is large and will make the cord feel heavy at times.  My ONLY complaint is that the cord is made of a very "rubbery" material and it tends to catch on itself (if you wind it up when not in use, it is a little tough to untangle it).  Other than that, I love these headphones.  I liked mine so much, I bought a second pair for my wife, who uses them regularly as well.  HIGHLY recommended.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Very comfortably for running in.  Can hardly feel them.  I like how you can still hear things around you.

reviews.title: Bose sport headphones
reviews.text:
Fantastic Bose sound.
The assortment of earpieces fit with no problem and the additional stabilizers don't allow the earbuds to fall out! even when on the elliptical trainer.
A great deal. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Favorite running headphone, worth the splurge.
reviews.text: I've had these headphones for over 2 years with no complaints. I used to go through headphones on a monthly basis, but Bose provided me with the quality and durability I was looking for with sport headphones. I one time accidentally put these headphones in the washer and dryer, because they were left in my pocket, and they still work with no defects. (Sweat-proof and maybe even waterproof) They are great for staying safe while running or biking outdoors, while still providing excellent Bose sound quality. I like the interchangeable earpieces for the perfect fit and comfort while running. There is no need to readjust or worry about the earpieces falling out or getting yanked out. The versatile cord length was a bonus for less cord hassle, but if this product were to be upgraded I might suggest a flat cord for less tangle during storage.

reviews.title: Great in ear head phones.
reviews.text: Use almost daily with iPhone. Good sound, good quality very water resistant. The extension cable is a nice touch. You won't be disappointed. NO heavy Bass, just crystal clear music.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.title: Hold really well
reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

reviews.title: The quanity you get for the price + the quality is excellent
reviews.text: I like the comfort, quality, and price of these replacement earbuds.  The foam holds up well to use, they never fall off, and they do block out sound around you but not so much you can't hear that someone spoke to you.  The price and quantity is the best on Amazon

reviews.title: Not so great

👉Thickened Silicone Layer : 3.0mm thickness, thicker and stronger than other silicone protective cases, 360-degree full protection body to prevent scratch and fall protection.

👉Shock-Absorbing and Drop Protection : Applying the latest technology, the appearance of silicone is extremely silky and soft, and it feels great in your hands. The silicone protective case fits snugly on the Beats Fit Pro and is not easy to drop.
👉Note：You will get 1*Beats Fit Pro case, 1*Carabiner Clip,1*Lanyard. (Beats Fit Pro Charging Case NOT included.)

reviews.title: Junk!!!!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:88b8d1d87437eceffc601b4e530551b7]] Took forever to get here.  The case is 2 plastic pieces that is held on with some 2 sided tape. They fit don’t fit perfect and doesn’t stick to the case very well either. The plastic is not very clear

reviews.title: Excellent Case
reviews.text:
AirPod Pro’s are horrible.

That said, my NEW Beat Fits are superb. I also prefer the larger case, I have larger hands and find the larger Beats case easier to handle.

This cover really hits all the marks for me. I love the string wrist attachment and how easier it is to grip, and hold the case when handling. I used to drop my AirPods case religiously because it was so small. This thing ain’t going nowhere.

I recommend this case.

reviews.title: Maybe I’m Spoiled
reviews.text: I had airpod pros with a nice case that felt like ver cohesive. This cover doesn’t feel like it’s part of the case at all. Very flimsy, like it can detach at anytime.

Multiple internal shielding Oxygen-free copper, triple shielding, increase anti-interference ability, and ensure superior sound quality fidelity. The enhanced signal clarity is very suitable for studio or live performances. The double-layer nylon braid can prevent the cable from being pulled over the harsh installation of sharp edges. Prevent it from being scratched. The zinc alloy shell prevents scratches and rust, and is more durable.

Plug and play:Connect a mobile phone, speaker, laptop or PC with a Lightning jack speaker output to a device with a 2 x 6.35 mm jack input. The 24K gold-plated connectors are corrosion resistant and ensure the best sound quality. No need to install drivers, plug and play
High-quality wire: nylon braid protects your cable. This Lightning to dual 6.35 mm mono plug audio cable is equipped with a nylon braid to prevent scratches and abrasion and prolong its service life.

Hi-Fi Sound Quality: We use high-quality copper shields to ensure high-fidelity sound quality and provide maximum conductivity and durability. Especially suitable for recording studios or live performances. It can transmit high-purity audio signals with minimal loss, bringing you a different listening experience.
What You Get: Lightning to 6.35mm 1/4 stereo cable ×1.

reviews.title: Works with iPhone 13
reviews.text:
This appears to use analog out over Lighting rather than having a DAC in the cable. Evidence is that there is volume control similar to using headphones rather than the no volume when plugged into an audio interface. Also if you touch the connector while plugged into speakers you get the sort of popping and cracking found when messing with a headphone cable.

So in summary, it just works.
